name: Dark Matter Battery
tips: Dark Matter Battery deals passive damage to the opponent's HP equal to your Dark Matter stacks each turn. At high DM, this is a win condition by itself.
At range 2, Battery can sit in the back row and ping the opponent's life total without ever entering combat. Protect it with front-line minions.
Unlike other DM cards, Battery is a Machine, not a Mage — it doesn't benefit from Mage-specific DM buffs. Its value is purely in the passive damage.
Pair with Grave Caller and Shady Trade Deal to ramp DM quickly. Each DM stack increases Battery's damage output permanently.
At 0/20, Battery can't attack normally. Its entire value is the passive. If the opponent ignores it, the damage adds up fast; if they focus it, your other minions operate freely.
